headline: Is Tractor Supply (TSCO) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Tractor Supply is attractively priced after a choppy spell in the market, or if the stock still carries more risk than reward at today's levels. The share price recently closed at US$45.77, with a 3.1% decline over 7 days and a 12.9% decline over 30 days, adding to a 10.0% decline year to date and an 11.2% decline over 1 year, while still showing a 6.2% gain over 3 years and a 39.3% gain over 5 years. These mixed returns sit against a backdrop in which...
